title: equisetum ramosissimum subsp. moorei
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum subsp. moorei, also known as the Australian scouring rush, is a species of horsetail plant native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Equisetum ramosissimum subsp. moorei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support overall immune function. Equisetum ramosissimum subsp. moorei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
